summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF seeks to track an index of the largest non-financial companies listed on the Nasdaq based on market capitalization, offering a way to invest in innovative companies in the U.S. at a cost-effective price.

data.title: BlackRock Looks to Challenge QQQ With New Nasdaq-100 ETF
data.text: On Thursday, July 9, BlackRock debuted the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (IQQ). IQQ marks a significant inflection point in the ETF market, as BlackRock looks to challenge the tried-and-true Invesco QQQ Trus...

data.title: QQQ, Meet IQQ. BlackRock Is Launching a Cheaper Nasdaq-100 ETF.
data.text: BlackRock joins State Street and Invesco in offering investors ETFs that track the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 index.

data.title: BlackRock to launch Nasdaq-100 ETF, challenging Invesco's dominance as AI rally boosts demand
data.text: BlackRock said on Tuesday it would launch an exchange-traded fund tracking the technology-heavy Nasdaq-100 index , as ​it seeks to tap surging investor demand for exposure to ‌the AI-driven stock mark...

data.title: BlackRock Expands Investor Access to Innovative Companies with iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BlackRock today announced plans to launch the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (Nasdaq:IQQ), designed to provide investors with cost-efficient access to the companies driving innovati...

holdings.infoBox: IQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.73%, Apple at 7.32%, Micron Technology at 4.87%, Microsoft at 4.50%, and Amazon.com at 4.19%.
